heading: Compare Session Reports
subheading: Select 2-3 sessions and compare report scores side-by-side with trend signals.

sections.trendDescription: Overall score progression across selected sessions (chronological order).
sections.testCasesDescription: Compare how many test cases each session passed before moving into criteria-level scoring.
sections.criteriaTrendsDescription: Larger per-criterion trend views across the same selected sessions.
sections.sideBySideDescription: Compare overall and dimension scores per session.
sections.scoreMatrixDescription: Session-by-session score comparison across all criteria.

overallShift.title: Overall Shift
overallShift.body: The comparison moves from {{from}} to {{to}} overall.

biggestSwing.title: Biggest Swing
biggestSwing.body: This criterion moved {{delta}} from the first session.

currentFocus.title: Current Focus
currentFocus.body: This is the lowest-scoring criterion in the latest selected session at {{score}}.

state.loadingSessionsBody: Fetching sessions that have reports available for comparison.
state.needMoreSelectionsBody: Use the green compare button to choose two or three sessions.
state.waitingForReportsBody: Selected sessions must have ready reports before comparison can render.
state.pendingReports: {{count}} selected session report(s) are still pending.
state.failedReports: {{count}} selected session report(s) failed to load.
state.noTrendData: Not enough scored sessions to draw a trend chart.
